issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
Wrong(probably outdated) information is provided in this link:
https://wiki.iota.org/shimmer/learn/smart-contracts/smart-contracts-community-tutorials/

**To Reproduce**
1. visit the link: 
https://wiki.iota.org/shimmer/learn/smart-contracts/smart-contracts-community-tutor
test_description_zh: 访问 /shimmer/learn/smart-contracts/smart-contracts-community-tutorials/ 页面，检查页面中展示的智能合约社区教程相关信息内容是否为最新且准确的内容。
expected_result_zh: 页面展示的智能合约社区教程信息应为最新、准确的内容，不包含过时或错误的说明。
